text: Appa ki chuppi ne mujhe itna dara diya hai ki mere dimaag ne kaam karna band kar diya hai. NRI aspirations aur US MS ka sapna is low CGPA aur back paper ki wajah se toot gaya, aur ab 'log kya kahenge' wali ghabrahat ne mujhe bilkul paralyse kar diya hai. Mujhe supplementary form ya next attempt ka kuch nahi sochna, bas main apne strict PG ke room mein rone ke alawa kuch nahi kar pa rahi.

Mere result card dekh kar Appa ekdum khamosh ho gaye aur do din se baat nahi kar rahe, jisse meri aatma sharam se kaanp rahi hai. Iyer uncle ki beti ka placement cutoff clear ho gaya aur main yahan attendance shortage aur back papers mein doobi hui hoon. Is strict hostel curfew mein main doston ke paas rone bhi nahi ja sakti, mera dimaag itna blank hai ki lagta hai kal hi shaadi tay kar denge aur main bas bistar par dher hoon.

Appa ne result aane ke baad meri taraf dekhna chhod diya hai aur is silent treatment ne mujhe completely tod diya hai. Ek toh main pehle hi NEET dropper reh chuki hoon aur ab Chennai aakar restricted mobility ke chakkar mein akele bahar library bhi nahi ja paayi jisse meri CGPA itni gir gayi. Main attendance cover karne ya professors se baat karne ka koi plan nahi bana pa rahi, bas itni hopeless feel kar rahi hoon ki aansu ruk hi nahi rahe.

Jabse Appa ne meri low CGPA dekh kar phone cut kiya hai, mujhe lag raha hai ki 'kuch nahi hoga mera' aur main washroom mein chup kar bilakh rahi hoon. Safety concerns aur hostel ki pabandiyon mein meri rank pehle hi gir chuki thi, aur ab dar hai ki relatives sidha meri marriage ki baat chalayenge. Main HOD se re-evaluation ke liye milne ka bilkul nahi soch sakti, bas ghutan aur darr ne mere dimaag ko sunn kar diya hai.

Meri 6 CGPA dekhne ke baad Appa ka phone par poori tarah chup ho jana meri jaan nikal raha hai aur mera dimaag blank ho chuka hai. Ek taraf Reddy uncle ka beta top rank la raha hai aur main yahan back paper aur attendance shortage ke bojh tale 'log kya kahenge' ka trauma jhel rahi hoon. Abhi mujhe make-up classes ka koi option mat do, mera dil itna bhara hua hai ki main akele pan aur dar se bas kaanp rahi hoon.
